dialogos.texto_en: Hey, Futaro?\nLet's take Raiha-chan too.
Raiha too?\nReally?
Of course, she's already like family, right?
......\nWell, I guess so, yeah.
Great!
Hmm.
What's with you two?
Well, I just thought that hearing 'Futaro' from Nino\nhas become quite familiar.
Uesugi-san seems to have gotten used to it too.\nAt first, he was blushing every time.
That was embarrassing to watch.
Sh-shut up!
Well, not just that,\nbut to call each other family,\ncould it be that you two...
What?!\nN-no way, Nino... that far?!
It's okay, they haven't gone that far.\nNino is reserved in that sense,\nand Futaro is%p-2;――
H-hold it! Don't make wild assumptions!
Well, it's heartwarming, isn't it?
What are you looking at?
A big sister's perspective? Just kidding.
But, Futaro-kun?\nBe careful not to make Nino uneasy.
...I know.
(I don't have to be told that. I know myself\n that there hasn't been much progress\n since I confessed my feelings to Nino.)
(I had exams, and I had a job as a tutor.\n Nino was considerate of me in that regard.)
(I'm done with my exams now, but as long as I\n go to Tokyo, we'll be forced into a so-called\n long-distance relationship.)
(I have no doubt about Nino's feelings.\n But as a beginner in love...\n to be honest, I'm nothing but anxious.)
(That's why, on this trip, I want to deepen my bond\n with Nino even more.\n For that reason...!)
(During this trip! I will KISS HER!!)
(Remember, that guy kissed her before.\n As they say, love is about taking the initiative...\n So I'll do as you say, Nino!)
Oh, that's right, Uesugi-san,\ndon't worry about Raiha-chan's travel expenses!
Since we're the ones inviting her,\nit's only natural for us to cover the cost.
O-okay.\nI feel kinda bad. Thanks for the help.
